title: Выпуск #5: 105 навыков — Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, MCP-серверы

skills.name: Anthropic Docx Skill

skills.desc: Extract text/tables, create PDFs, merge/split documents, and handle forms programmatically.
